seedMemories.text: Tried keyword stuffing on the Ahmedabad page. Citation dropped the next week and competitor BuildX displaced the page.
Added FAQ schema markup to the Rajkot landing page. The page was cited by ChatGPT within two weeks.
Ahmedabad page reached position 1 after FAQ schema and fresh 2026 statistics.
FAQ schema plus fresh stats consistently recovered local-intent pages across Rajkot, Ahmedabad, Vadodara, and Gandhinagar.

expectedObservation.text: FAQ schema plus fresh stats recover local-intent pages.
